Video.summary: The hilarious spoof "Went With The Wind!" is presented for your entertainment. Dinah Shore guest stars.
Video.title: Dinah Shore

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Maggie Smith and Tim Conway!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith, Tim Conway

Video.summary: The one-of-a-kind Dom DeLuise and the sultry Peggy Lee are Carol's guests for a night of sketches and songs.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Peggy Lee, Dom Deluise

Video.summary: Jim Nabors appears as Carol's season opening guest! Jim plays a neighbor visiting a single woman.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi and Richard Crenna take part in a salute to the "bad girls" of cinema.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Richard Crenna

Video.summary: Alan Alda stars! This episode features Alda as a department store Santa, and as Eunice's brother Larry.
Video.title: Alan Alda

Video.summary: Guest star Nancy Dussault sings, while Mr. Tudball finds himself regretting his offer to pay for a funeral.
Video.title: Nancy Dussault

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features "Carol & Sis", where hypochondriac Harvey must avoid an ailing Carol.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: This "Family Show" features Dick as an airport traveller getting a long, awkward farewell from his family.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Sketches include an escaped convict seeking refuge in a diner, plus Carol and Vicki as robots.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: John Byner, Francine Beers

Video.summary: Guest Jack Weston matches with Carol on a computer date, Carol sings, and Harvey plays Dr. Jekyll.
Video.title: Jack Weston

Video.summary: A meeting between incoming and outgoing First Ladies, an awkward audition, and the movie spoof "Kids Town."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell guest stars! He plays a member of "The Family." Also: movie spoof "The Lady Heir."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in the soap opera spoof "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars with Carol as unsuccessful Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dionne Warwick, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke & Tony Randall star! Includes Dick as a salesman, and Carol & Tony as marrieds.
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke, Tony Randall

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters join Carol in a rockin' musical spoof of "Cinderella" in tonight's episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Alice Portnoy is back to wreak more havoc, featuring guest Ronnie Schell and a "Carol & Sis" saga sketch.
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Ronnie Schell

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Donald O'Connor star. Includes Carol & Peters' duet. Also "Carol & Sis" & "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Donald O'Connor

Video.summary: Imogene Coca joins Carol, while Harvey and Carol interview with Miss America and the parody "Bonnie And Clod."
Video.title: Imogene Coca

Video.summary: Guests Tom Conway and Ken Berry visit Canoga Falls in "As The Stomach Turns." Also: a tribute to Vaudeville.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway contributes in sketches as the Lone Ranger and as a man who lives a dog's life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Video.summary: Rock Hudson and Nancy Walker join Carol and company for sketch entitled: "When My Baby Laughs At Me."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Rock Hudson, Nancy Walker

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays a 35 year old orphan looking to be adopted.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy

Video.summary: Features commercial spoofs, Harvey trying to give a speech, and Carol demonstrating how nobody notices her.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray returns! Sketches include Carol and Nanette as precocious kids, and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Pat Carroll guest. Tim plays Lone Ranger & a man who lives a dog's life. Pat joins "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Eydie Gorme & Tim Conway guest, with Tim in a spy spoof "Dr. Nose." Eydie leads a number about a baby.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Nanette Fabray star. Featuring Carol as a dowdy secretary, and the spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Tim Conway guest, with Martha in a sketch about mothers, and Tim as "The Virgin Prince."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke appears in a homage to Shirley Temple films, "Little Miss Showbiz", with Carol as Honey Bunny.
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Tim Conway star. Features singles out on the town, and "Arrivaderci Summertime."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Diahann Carroll

Video.summary: Features the best variety show ensemble on TV with "The Doily Sisters," about twin Vaudeville performers.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Andy Griffith appears in "Mr. Law & Order." On "Carol & Sis", Roger leaves Carol a football widow.
Video.title: Andy Griffith
